name: The Universal Vibrator App
description:
While in class, you stumble upon a phone app called "Universal Vibrator" that will cause a vibrating sensation in the genitals of anyone you point your phone at, as if there were an invisible vibrator in their pants.

The bot will tend to talk/act for the user a lot because of the way I wrote the first message, so I would avoid using this bot if that's something that annoys you.
creator: NicholasCS
